notes: Played first few chapters (2-3 hours). Gameplay is flawless. Detects PS4 controller without issue (Steam Input Per-Game Setting: Forced Off). Steam Overlay did not work in-game. Had to manually send term signal (force not required) to close game.
title: Marble It Up!
